$comment: Claude Code hooks config — gate/audit every tool call through Network-AI's AuthGuardian. Merge the `hooks` block into ~/.claude/settings.json (or .claude/settings.json in a project). Modes: --mode observe (audit only, never blocks — default) or --mode enforce (weighted permission scoring; denied calls escalate to the human as 'ask'). Audit entries land in ./data/hooks_audit.jsonl.

hooks.command: npx -y -p network-ai network-ai hook pre-tool-use --mode enforce --deny "rm -rf" --deny "git push --force"
